feature.title: Custom-made experiences
feature.description: Our services are available in top destinations across Mexico. You can enhance your experience with additional elements through a personalized quote aligned with your vision.

coverage.title: Coverage and General Terms
coverage.description: Our services are offered in multiple cities and destinations throughout Mexico. Availability, logistics, and additional costs may vary depending on the type of experience and the selected plan.

personalize.title: Customize your experience
personalize.description: If you would like to carry out your experience in a destination not listed here, contact us to receive a personalized quote based on location and logistics requirements.

AboutPage.quote: Each experience can be modified and scaled depending on the production level you are looking for.

reservations.title: Reservations
reservations.subtitle: We suggest booking at least one week in advance.
reservations.description: For premium experiences, exclusive destinations, or peak seasons, booking earlier is recommended to guarantee availability of locations, suppliers, and production.
